title: RC Cars 1:14 RC Truck 30 MPH 4WD Remote Control Car Fast All Terrain RC Trophy Truck for Adults Teens Boys 50Mins Off-Road RC Buggy Big Short Course RC Truck with 2 Batteries (RTR)
features: 【All Terrain RC Car】: This trophy rc truck equipped with rubber tires, head-up wheel, suspension metal shocks and a sturdy chassis structure. This rc buggy can run and jump on mud, beach,grass, snow, rock road,sand dunes

【Upgraded 390 Motor】: This 1/14 RC cars come with a powerful motor and advanced metal cooling system, which push tires over various road obstacles and make this race car super fast, Up to 48KMH (30MPH)

【Sensitive Control】: This electric rc car equipped IPX4 waterproof 30A ESC, 5-wire 17G servo, and full-scale synchronous remote control system used to accurately proportional throttle and steering control，allowing you to fully control your car

【Funny Adult RC Truck】: Equipped with a 7.4V 1300mAh and 1 * 1500mAh rechargeable batteries, each battery can play for 40-50 minutes (depending on different speeds). Attention: Stop for at least 15 minutes to allow the motor to dissipate heat. This car is equipped with 3 sets of LED lights and 3 modes flashing lights

【Aggressive and Realistic Look】: It boasts a full rear roll cage on which are mounted two authentic spare tires, which contributes to a realistic 4WD short course truck appearance and maintain balanced weight distribution

【Gifts for RC Enthusiasts】: This rc truck with attractive appearance . It is very suitable as a ideal gift for all beginner or RC cars amateur, boyfriend, brother around you on important holidays such as Birthday, Children's Day, Christmas, Father's Day
description: Product Description This 1:14 scale remote-controlled car is built for speed enthusiasts, featuring all-terrain tires and a powerful RC390 motor capable of reaching speeds up to 50 km/h. Its full-scale throttle control system enables smooth acceleration and precise speed adjustment, giving you the edge on any track. 2.4GHz Anti-Interference Control System The 2.4GHz system delivers responsive remote control functionality with an effective operating range of up to 100 meters (328 feet). This system supports simultaneous racing of multiple vehicles without interference, enabling effortless navigation across various tracks and terrains. High-capacity Battery, Over 40 Minutes of Runtime. This RC car gives at least 40 mins of playtime（with 2 batteries）. Safe for kids 8–12 with overcharge, over-discharge, low-voltage & thermal protection. Perfect gift for birthday, Christmas & New Year.
